- DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COPIES OF COURT BANKRUPTCY FILING AND BANKRUPTCY DISMISSAL.

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE RRENEWAL OF JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM JAN-30-2003 TO MAR-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUED FOR PLTF TO PROVIDE COPIES OF HER BANKRUPTCY FILING; IF NOT PROVIDED, CASE WILL BE SUBMITTED FOR DECISION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALVORSON, LLOYD E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN UPP, ARDEN $1,556.43 PRINCIPAL, $1,527.60 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,098.03, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE # 724741. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON DEC 11, 1992. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
